title: Velvety Fermented Penne Stir-fry
description: A delicious brunch-mood dish featuring fermented pasta with a rich velvety sauce to satisfy any craving for authenticity and flavor in the Arabian culinary tradition.
instructions: Preheat a pan over medium heat and add oil. Add onion and garlic; sauté for about 5 minutes until fragrant.
Add penne pasta to the pan with some reserved pasta water to create a creamy sauce. Stir-fry for another 3-4 minutes until heated through.
Pour in fermented ketchup and stir continuously, letting it caramelize slightly and thicken into a rich sauce.
If desired, add pesto for an extra layer of flavor. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot with fresh herbs or lemon wedges on the side.
